description: At-a-glance status, bitrate, and platform for all 8 Web Presenter devices

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WP1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "status")
  |> last()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WP1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "videoBitrate")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 1000000.0}))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WP1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cache")
  |> last()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WP1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "name")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => strings.containsStr(v: r.url, substr: "activePlatform"))
  |> last()

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WP2")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "status")
